title: Can someone tell me the date Q be released in theater
display_title: Can someone tell me the date Q be released in theater
wikitext:
[]: Can someone tell me the date Q be released in theater Post by 39123811 » Thu Apr 25, 2013 4:18 am I check IMDB it is said to be released in theater on May 5th? Can I trusted it? Is there any place on internet i can more details about release in American theater?

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Apr 25, 2013 4:31 am There has been zero information regarding a US release right now. Anything you read anywhere else online is junk. Trust me, once 3.0 has even an inkling of an American release date EvaGeeks will let you know. They're kinda great like that.

[]: Post by 39123811 » Thu Apr 25, 2013 4:35 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: There has been zero information regarding a US release right now. Anything you read anywhere else online is junk. Trust me, once 3.0 has even an inkling of an American release date EvaGeeks will let you know. They're kinda great like that.

[]: Post by qu4d » Thu Apr 25, 2013 4:41 am Everybody can edit imdb, no confirmed information regarding Eva Q. AFAIK only South Korea had a theatrical release next to Japan.

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Apr 25, 2013 4:44 am IMDB is a professional website. Yes. But it's also a User run website. If you have an IMDB account you can log onto a page & literally make edits. Yes, the edit needs to go through one of the website moderators but there's so many projects, so many TV shows, movies, mini-series & shorts that it's impossible for them to double-check & triple-check every little edit recommendation they receive so a lot of stuff seeps through the cracks. Someone could log onto the Eva 3.0 page & say the movie is coming out December 25, 2015 & more likely then not the site will say that within a few weeks. It's hardly the place to go for real film news. IMDB had Johnny Depp listed as having a center role in Martin Scorsese's 'Hugo' for over a year. Why? Because he was a very much removed co-producer on the film. Even when Scorsese & Depp himself said "he's not in the film" a few diehard fans kept his name coming back to the page. Hell, a few years ago a 15 year old kid got his name put on the dead Live Action Evangelion IMDB page as Director. Take things you read on IMDB with a grain of salt. Unless it's confirmed elsewhere it's not confirmed.

[]: Post by Reichu » Thu Apr 25, 2013 9:56 am What Gendo'sPapa said.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Apr 25, 2013 10:03 am Also, IMDB is not like Wikipedia. On Wikipedia, inaccurate information gets scrubbed. On IMDB, it stays until something accurate replaces it.
